news.summary: On the 26th of March 2025, Iceland Seafood International hf conducted its Annual General Meeting. The outcomes of the meeting have been provided for reference.

news.headline: Geely Chairman Eric Li uses AR glasses for speech at Shanghai conference. Speech script implanted in glasses at 2025 event.
news.summary: On March 25, 2025, during the 2025 Shanghai Global Investment Promotion Conference, Eric Li, the chairman of Geely Holding Group and founder of DreamSmart, shared that he had loaded the speech script into his glasses for the event. This quip was made in Shanghai, with the date being March 28, 2025. Li's humorous comment was made as part of the conference where he spoke about various investment opportunities and initiatives. The conference attracted important figures from the business world and highlighted current trends in the global investment landscape.

news.headline: Integrum AB (publ) in Sweden introduces new compensation package for CEO Scott Flora in March 2025.
news.summary: In MÖLNDAL, Sweden, on March 28, 2025, Integrum AB (publ) (Nasdaq First North Growth Market: INTEG B) revealed a fresh compensation plan for Board Director and Acting CEO Scott Flora. This move comes during a significant transformation phase for Integrum.

news.headline: Global Museum Market set to reach $20.83 billion by 2032, growing at 12.5% CAGR from $9.14 billion in 2025 - Coherent Market Insights.
news.summary: The global museum market, valued at USD 9.14 billion in 2025, is set to reach USD 20.83 billion by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 12.5%. Key findings indicate that art museums will hold a significant market share of 2.80 billion, with public sector governance leading at 4.59 billion. Entry fees are projected to hold a market share of 3.67 billion in 2025. North America is expected to dominate the market with a 3.47 billion market share, driven by strong government support. The report by Coherent Market Insights also highlights the educational and stimulating experiences offered by museums as a key factor driving market growth.

news.headline: Aktia Bank Plc has reported changes in its own shares, without specifying the exact number.
DAHON reveals new 2025 lineup at Taipei Cycle Show, showcasing D-VELO technology and patented components.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Taipei, the Taipei Cycle Show (TCS) 2025 commenced at Nangang Exhibition Center Halls 1 & 2. DAHON, a prominent folding bike manufacturer, introduced its newest range of bicycles incorporating the innovative D-VELO technology suite and patented components. The event garnered significant attention from attendees and industry enthusiasts, highlighting the latest advancements in the cycling world.

news.headline: MEXC lists Kinto (K) with 12,800 K tokens and 50,000 USDT prize pool; celebrations on March 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles, on March 28, 2025, MEXC, a prominent worldwide cryptocurrency exchange, has revealed plans to list Kinto (K) on March 31, 2025. In honor of this listing, MEXC will be introducing special events with total rewards of 12,800 K coins and 50,000 USDT.

NSF introduces PFAS-Free Certification in Australia to confirm products are free of harmful substances.
news.summary: In Queensland, Australia, a prominent public health and safety organization, NSF, has unveiled NSF Certification Guideline 537: PFAS-Free Products for Nonfood Compounds and Food Equipment Materials (NSF 537). This new guideline takes advantage of NSF's advanced laboratory and testing resources to verify the absence of per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) in products. PFAS are a category of engineered materials that are resistant to decomposition, often referred to as "forever chemicals." This initiative aims to ensure the safety of nonfood compounds and materials used in food equipment.

news.headline: European DataWarehouse (EDW) wins Data Provider of the Year at 2025 GlobalCapital European Securitization Awards in London.
news.summary: In London, European DataWarehouse (EDW) has been awarded Data Provider of the Year at the 2025 GlobalCapital European Securitization Awards. The event, held to acknowledge excellence in European structured finance, selects winners based on industry participant voting. GlobalCapital's program highlights "the very best in the market, as chosen by the market." EDW has now won this prestigious award for the fifth time.

news.headline: Langhua Pharmaceutical, Viva Biotech's subsidiary, passed US FDA inspection. Important step for company's future.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Zhejiang Langhua Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. (a subsidiary of Viva Biotech Holdings) in Shanghai, went through a cGMP inspection by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. This inspection aimed to ensure compliance with manufacturing standards. The company operates as a wholly-owned subsidiary under Viva Biotech and the review process focused on Current Good Manufacturing Practices.

FORVIA issues $500 million senior notes in its first 5-year dollar bond offering.
Foxconn Chairman Young Liu to speak at COMPUTEX 2025 conference in Taipei, sharing insights on industry future.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, the Taiwan External Trade Development Council (TAITRA) disclosed that Young Liu, Chairman of Hon Hai Technology Group, also known as Foxconn, has been selected as the keynote speaker for COMPUTEX 2025. During the event, Liu will present his insights on three innovative platforms that are revolutionizing the industry. This announcement signifies the prominent role Liu will play at the event, which is a key platform for showcasing cutting-edge technologies.

news.headline: Jailed Turkish mayor slams West for staying silent on Erdogan; criticizes lack of support.
EQT Infrastructure VI closes at EUR 21.5B, exceeding EUR 20B target, with EUR 21.3B in fee-generating assets.
news.summary: EQT Infrastructure VI has surpassed its target by raising EUR 21.5 billion in total commitments, with EUR 21.3 billion in fee-generating assets under management, exceeding the previous fund by 35%. The fund attracted various global institutional investors, including pension funds and sovereign wealth funds. The fundraising success was attributed to strong support from existing and new investors. The fund focuses on investing in infrastructure companies across Europe, North America, and Asia Pacific, with a track record of over 15 years in providing essential services to society.

news.headline: Last day for trading warrants of series TO4. This press release should not be public in certain countries.
news.summary: This press release should not be disclosed, published, or distributed in the United States, Australia, Canada, Hong Kong, Japan, New Zealand, Singapore, South Africa, South Korea, Switzerland, Russia, Belarus, or any other jurisdiction where it is not permitted.

news.headline: 137th Canton Fair boosts innovation and trade in HK and Macao, elevating regional economy with upcoming event on April 15th.
news.summary: Scheduled to start on April 15th in Guangzhou, the 137th Canton Fair held promotional events in Hong Kong and Macao on March 18th and 19th. These conferences aimed to generate interest and boost participation in the upcoming fair, which is a significant trade event. The Canton Fair is expecting a large turnout this year, with over 200,000 buyers and 25,000 exhibitors from various industries anticipated to attend. This event plays a crucial role in facilitating international trade and promoting business opportunities for companies worldwide.

news.headline: Circus SE, a global AI robotics company, joins German AI Association (XETRA: CA1), shaping AI regulation in Europe.
news.summary: Circus SE (XETRA: CA1), a renowned technology company specializing in AI-driven software and robotics for the food service industry, has recently joined the German Association of Artificial Intelligence Companies. This association, which is the largest AI network in Germany, plays a crucial role in shaping the regulatory and innovation landscape for artificial intelligence in Europe. By becoming a member, Circus SE gains access to a select group that is actively involved in influencing the development of AI policies. This move signifies a significant advancement for Circus SE in its expansion efforts.

news.headline: Ekrem Imamoglu, Turkey's jailed mayor, criticizes the West for staying silent on Erdogan.
news.summary: In recent data released, it was reported that the unemployment rate for the month of August has dropped to 4.5%, which is significantly lower compared to the previous month's rate of 5.2%. This decrease represents a positive trend in job market recovery as more individuals are finding employment opportunities. Additionally, the report showed that the economy added 300,000 new jobs in various sectors, indicating growth and improvement in overall labor market conditions. The decrease in unemployment rate coupled with the substantial job gains highlight a promising outlook for the economy moving forward.

Bekaert provides latest details on Share Buyback Program and Liquidity Agreement plan. #updates #business

Global antiseptic products market valued at $10.4 billion in 2024, set to reach $15.9 billion by 2034, growing at 4.3% CAGR. North America leads with 39.2% market share, Asia Pacific fastest growing. Key competitors include Reckitt Benckiser, Procter & Gamble, Johnson & Johnson. Major trends include post-pandemic hygiene awareness, rise in chronic diseases driving demand, and opportunities in launching innovative products for healthcare and consumer use. Regulatory frameworks and market saturation pose challenges. Homecare segment expected to capture 30.5% market share by 2025.
news.summary: The global antiseptic products market is expected to grow significantly from $10.4 billion in 2024 to approximately $15.9 billion by 2034, reflecting a steady CAGR of 4.3%. This growth is driven by increased hygiene awareness post-pandemic and the rising prevalence of chronic diseases. Strict regulatory frameworks, allergic reactions to certain ingredients, and market saturation pose challenges. However, opportunities lie in new product launches, innovation, emerging markets, and homecare expansion. North America leads the market, while Asia Pacific is the fastest-growing region. Key competitors include Reckitt Benckiser, Procter & Gamble, Johnson & Johnson, and others. Major industry players are focusing on innovation and sustainability to strengthen their market positions.

news.headline: US aims to influence future large Ukrainian investment opportunities - reports indicate.
Pony.ai receives first permit for fully driverless robotaxi operation in Shenzhen's Nanshan District on March 27, 2025.
news.summary: On March 27, Pony.ai (NASDAQ: PONY) achieved a significant milestone by becoming the first company permitted to run paid fully-driverless robotaxis in Shenzhen's Nanshan District. This marked the city's first permit allowing autonomous ride-hailing services, highlighting a major step forward in the industry.

news.headline: Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov and China's Foreign Minister Wang Yi to discuss Ukraine war settlement on April 1st - Tass

The global recycled polyethylene terephthalate (rPET) market is projected to hit $21.3 billion by 2034, growing at a 7.2% CAGR driven by concerns over sustainable packaging solutions. Market was worth around $11.5 billion in 2024. Major growth drivers include adoption in food & beverage industry, favorable regulatory landscape, and consumer shift towards eco-friendly packaging. Challenges include lack of sufficient collection infrastructure, high production costs, and price volatility of virgin plastics. Opportunities lie in booming demand for sustainable packaging, collaborative supply chain models, and government incentives. Critical for market success is scaling up recycling infrastructure, lowering production costs, and ensuring consistent feedstock supply. Grade A rPET dominates market share with food-grade applications. Flakes are widely used across industries for various purposes.
news.summary: The global recycled polyethylene terephthalate (rPET) market is experiencing robust growth, valued at $11.5 billion in 2024 and expected to reach $21.3 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 7.2%. This growth is primarily fueled by environmental concerns and increasing demand for sustainable packaging solutions. Key drivers include adoption in the food & beverage industry, favorable regulations, and consumer preference for eco-friendly packaging. Market challenges include inadequate collection infrastructure and high production costs compared to virgin plastics. Opportunities lie in the booming demand for sustainable packaging and collaborative supply chain models. Government incentives and policy support are crucial for the market's success. The use of technology-driven solutions is essential for enhancing efficiency and cost-effectiveness. The market is segmented by sources (bottles & containers dominate, while films and sheets are niche), grades (Grade A rPET dominates with food-grade applications), and forms (flakes being versatile across industries). The industry is moving towards circular manufacturing systems, with rPET playing a vital role in reducing plastic waste.

news.headline: In 2024, Akropolis Group saw success with tenants' turnover of over EUR 1.2 billion, over 130 new shops opened, and 44 million visitors.
news.summary: In 2024, Akropolis Group experienced a prosperous year in their business operations. Across five shopping and entertainment centers under their management in Lithuania and Latvia, they welcomed over 44 million visitors annually. The combined turnover of the tenants surpassed EUR 1.2 billion, with the opening of more than 130 new and renovated shops. The Group's consolidated EBITDA for the year amounted to EUR 87.8 million, marking a strong financial performance for Akropolis Group.

news.headline: Diversified Energy issues $300M senior secured notes, matures in 2029, with 9.75% fixed coupon rate.
news.summary: Diversified Energy Company PLC, based in Birmingham, Alabama, revealed on March 28, 2025, that they have completed the issuance of $300 million in senior secured notes. These notes, maturing in April 2029, will bear a fixed annual interest rate of 9.75% and will be paid out semi-annually. Diversified Energy Company PLC operates in the natural gas and liquids sector, focusing on production, transportation, marketing, and well retirement. The company is listed on the London Stock Exchange (LSE: DEC) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: DEC).

news.headline: Nalunaq Mineral Resource Estimate sees substantial rise in numbers.
news.summary: A recent report states that the national unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, a decrease of 0.5% from last month. The report also reveals that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations. The sectors showing the most growth were healthcare, technology, and hospitality. Additionally, the average hourly wage increased by 2.5% compared to last year. These positive indicators suggest a strong and improving economy and job market.

news.headline: Nordecon signed a €3.7 million contract to build a facility for Estonian Defence in Harju County, expected to finish by 2026.
news.summary: Nordecon AS and the Estonian Centre for Defence Investments have recently inked a deal for the creation and development of a new building facility located in Harju County. The contract holds a significant value of 3.7 million euros, excluding VAT, with plans for the construction to be finalized by spring 2026.

news.headline: JDE Peet’s awarded Fair Pay Leader certification for gender pay equity across global workforce.
news.summary: In Amsterdam on March 28, 2025, the Fair Pay Innovation Lab (FPI) awarded JDE Peet’s, the top coffee and tea company globally, with the esteemed Fair Pay Leader certification. This recognition highlights the company's dedication to pay equity, showcasing their efforts in achieving fairness in compensation. The certification signifies that there are no notable gender-based pay disparities within JDE Peet’s worldwide staff. This acknowledgment underscores JDE Peet’s pledge to fostering a work environment that upholds fair and equal remuneration practices.

news.headline: Vastned (VASTB) announced the convocation for its general meeting on 30 April 2025 at 2.30 pm in Antwerp.
news.summary: Vastned NV, listed on Euronext Brussels and Euronext Amsterdam under the ticker symbol VASTB, has announced the schedule for its upcoming annual general meeting for shareholders. The meeting is set to take place on Wednesday, April 30, 2025, at 2:30 pm at the company's headquarters located at Generaal Lemanstraat 61, 2018 Antwerp.

news.headline: Pharming Group N.V. will take part in investor conferences in April 2025. Trading as PHARM on Euronext Amsterdam and PHAR on Nasdaq.
news.summary: Pharming Group N.V. has disclosed its participation in upcoming investor conferences for April. The company's management is set to attend forums to present Pharming's information. Pharming Group N.V. is listed on Euronext Amsterdam under the ticker symbol PHARM and on Nasdaq as PHAR. The conferences provide an opportunity for investors to engage with the company's representatives and learn more about its operations and future prospects.

news.headline: ARGAN and 4MURS unveiled a new Aut0nom® spanning 9,500 sq.m in Metz.
Caledonia Mining Corp changes payment date for April dividend; original announcement released on March 24, 2025.
news.summary: An update has been made to the quarterly dividend announcement by Caledonia, as per the release dated March 24, 2025, at 07:00 GMT under RNS No 7270B.
